name: Evidence Tracking
purpose: Document product provenance, attach excerpts from source blocks, build evidence chain.
design_intent: Every product field has explicit evidence. Enables debugging 'why this product?' and audit trail.
change_impact: New evidence structure per-product. Previously evidence was global, now per-product.

required_fields: evidenceChain - Array<{ productId, field, source, excerpt }>

name_field.source: LLM if used, else Cheerio block text
name_field.confidence: LLM confidence or Cheerio block confidence

evidence_chain_building.step_1: For each finalProduct, find matching blocks in stage1Output
evidence_chain_building.step_2: If product from LLM, find prompt context in stage3Output
evidence_chain_building.step_3: Attach excerpt for each field (name, price, duration)
evidence_chain_building.step_4: Build evidenceChain array linking product → field → source → excerpt
evidence_chain_building.step_5: Assert evidence exists for each product (fail-closed)

validation.optional_evidence: price_evidence and duration_evidence if fields present
validation.fail_closed: If evidence missing for required field, add warning, lower confidence

test_cases.name: Missing evidence
test_cases.input: Product with price but no source excerpt

test_cases.name: Mixed evidence
test_cases.input: Name from LLM, price from Cheerio

acceptance_criteria: Evidence chain links product → field → excerpt
Test cases TC-5.1 through TC-5.4 pass
